code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Generate a fluent single‑sentence description from a list of triples."""
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Mapping of predicate to natural‑language phrase
    phrase_map = {
        "almaMater": "who graduated from",
        "birthDate": "who was born on",
        "birthName": "whose birth name was",
        "birthPlace": "who was born in",
        "dateOfRetirement": "and retired in",
        "occupation": "who worked as",
        "status": "currently has status",
        "timeInSpace": "who spent",
        "mission": "who participated in mission",
        "selectedByNasa": "who was selected by NASA in",
        "deathDate": "and died on",
        "nationality": "who was a citizen of",
        "servedAsChiefOfTheAstronautOfficeIn": "who served as chief of the astronaut office in",
        "title": "who held the title",
        "ribbonAward": "and received the ribbon award",
        "operator": "which was operated by",
        "backupPilot": "with backup pilot",
        "commander": "with commander",
        "crewMembers": "with crew member",
        "representative": "who was represented by",
        "alternativeName": "also known as",
        "awards": "who received",
        "fossil": "which has fossil",
        "senators": "which has senators",
        "part": "which is part of",
        "partsType": "whose parts type is",
        "higher": "which is higher than",
        "isPartOf": "which is part of",
        "bird": "which has bird",
        "leader": "which has leader",
        "affiliation": "which is affiliated with",
        "competeIn": "which competes in",
        "president": "which has president",
        "award": "who received the award",
        "deathPlace": "and died in",
        "gemstone": "which has gemstone",
        "mascot": "which has mascot",
        "cosparId": "which has COSPAR ID",
        "utcOffset": "which has UTC offset",
    }

    # Count subject occurrences to find main subject
    subject_count: dict[str, int] = {}
    for t in triples:
        subject_count[t.subject] = subject_count.get(t.subject, 0) + 1

    main_subject = max(subject_count, key=subject_count.get) if subject_count else ""

    # Separate main subject triples from others
    main_triples = [t for t in triples if t.subject == main_subject]
    other_triples = [t for t in triples if t.subject != main_subject]

    # Build main clause
    main_clauses = []
    for t in main_triples:
        phrase = phrase_map.get(t.predicate, t.predicate.replace("_", " "))
        main_clauses.append(f"{t.subject} {phrase} {t.object}")

    # Build relative clauses for other triples
    relative_clauses = []
    for t in other_triples:
        phrase = phrase_map.get(t.predicate, t.predicate.replace("_", " "))
        relative_clauses.append(f"{t.subject} {phrase} {t.object}")

    # Combine into single sentence
    if len(main_clauses) == 1:
        sentence = main_clauses[0]
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(main_clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + main_clauses[-1]

    if relative_clauses:
        # Add relative clauses
        if len(relative_clauses) == 1:
            sentence += f" and {relative_clauses[0]}"
        else:
            sentence += f" and {', '.join(relative_clauses[:-1])} and {relative_clauses[-1]}"

    sentence = sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]
    if not sentence.endswith("."):
        sentence += "."
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
